result:
Done. Here's a summary of what was created/changed:

### New file
- **`ui/src/ui/views/channels.matrix.ts`** — Matrix-specific channel card with:
  - Homeserver URL (`baseUrl`)
  - Accounts count
  - Sync status (syncing / stopped / not configured)
  - Last start and last probe timestamps
  - Error callout for `lastError`
  - Probe result display (ok/failed, userId, elapsed time, error)
  - Multi-account rendering (when >1 account) with per-account homeserver, running status, last inbound, and errors
  - Config section via `renderChannelConfigSection`
  - "Test" button that triggers `onRefresh(true)` (probe)

### Modified files
- **`ui/src/ui/types.ts`** — Added `MatrixProbe` and `MatrixStatus` types (matching the probe shape from `extensions/matrix/src/matrix/probe.ts` and the channel summary from `buildProbeChannelStatusSummary`)
- **`ui/src/ui/views/channels.types.ts`** — Added `MatrixStatus` import and `matrix` field to `ChannelsChannelData`
- **`ui/src/ui/views/channels.ts`** — Imported `renderMatrixCard`, extracts `matrix` from the snapshot, passes it through `ChannelsChannelData`, and routes the `"matrix"` key to `renderMatrixCard` in the switch instead of falling through to the generic card

All lint and type checks pass (`pnpm check` clean).
